notes: 3.10.97 — TONG RA SOAT 'HAM MA' toan app (lenh Sep sau su co fmtNum GEOSUPORTER): quet tinh moi loi goi ham khong co dinh nghia (node --check khong bat duoc loai nay, chi no runtime). Phuong phap: tokenizer strip comment/string giu code trong ${} + quet rieng lop inline handler (onclick/onchange — vung mu cua tokenizer, la lop de crash nhat cua module tau) + grep xac minh dinh nghia tung ung vien. Ket qua: ngoai fmtNum (da va 3.10.96), tim them 3 HAM MA THAT — tat ca la BUG LANG (try/catch hoac typeof-guard nuot loi nen khong crash, chuc nang chet am tham): (1) loadAuth() trong lookupUserDeptName -> KHONG ton tai, dung la getAuthConfig() — hau qua production: cot 'phong ban nguoi tao phieu' luon hien '—'; DA SUA. (2) getSyncConfig() trong invAiExplain (Inventory Analytics AI, P3) -> KHONG ton tai, dung la getAuthConfig() — neu bat FLAG_INV_ANALYTICS_AI se luon bao 'Chua cau hinh Apps Script URL' du da cau hinh; DA SUA truoc khi bat flag. (3) setModalWide() goi 2 cho trong On/Off-Hire Import Wizard nhung KHONG ton tai — wizard bao gio cung khong mo rong duoc modal nhu y do goc; DA DINH NGHIA ham chuan (toggle class modal-wide tren #modal-window, khong dong preference nguoi dung). Cac ten con lai trong danh sach nghi van deu xac minh la false positive (tu tieng Viet/CSS/formula trong chuoi). Verify: static OK + test setModalWide on/off 2/2. Bao gom 3.10.42-96. Rollback=3.10.41.
